message: I think since there are only a few of us this time, you might be getting bored, but what do you think?
Bored? Not at all! I feel like I’m in a movie.
Oh, come on, that's such an exaggeration.
But.
Well, to you, it must seem like a glamorous world.
I've been close to this kind of world since I was a child, so.
That’s why I can see everything with a detached gaze.
I see. It seems like a really enviable thing to me.
Yeah, everyone says that. But I’ve always envied everyone.
Why is that?
I can't quite put it into words, but.
No matter how great a movie is, it can be boring when you know what’s behind it.
It's like a tragedy from knowing too much.
Ah, I’m sorry for turning this into a dark conversation.
At least the food is good, so enjoy the flavors.
Oh,
you’re blushing!
Huh?
Hehe, just kidding. But seeing you flustered makes it clear you’re happy that Meryl and Jennifer are here.
Any typical guy would feel that way.
Well, I can’t deny that.
I’m glad the party is lively.
